title: Cobblemon Updated
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731e9d310976c12383b8c213682746074297a58f_0.webp)

Cobblemon Updated is a small pack which features the new best Pokemon mod, Cobblemon alongside QOL Mods.

This pack is optimized for Maximum Cobblemon Enjoyment!

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/385a444e3cf001ba4f5fca2458c7adf7ac72ea32_0.webp)

- Capture, train, level up and trade your pokemons!
- Cobblemon, lots and lots of Cobblemon.
- Journey Map 
- Optimization Mods
- This pack includes the Server  Pokehub, thank you PokeHub for sponsoring this pack (This is not the official Cobblemon Server and is not affiliated with the Cobblemon Mod)

![Requirement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/339013e39a9da752bfdc1afc6004a42def04a396_0.webp)

This small pack is Optimized for the the smoothest gameplay

Best Performance: 4GB Minimum, 5-6GB For Best Results.

![Installing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d745d3fdfa05d9d8262680c3ee21c51032f8052_0.webp)

1) Install Mondrith Launcher [here](https://modrinth.com/app)

2) You MUST Allocate Enough Ram to Minecraft in the mondrith options.

3) Search 'Cobblemon Updated' in modpacks, install it.

4) Enjoy Cobblemon Updated.


_This modpack does not own Cobblemon, any issues with the Cobblemon mod please go directly to the official cobblemon discord_

This modpack will ALWAYS have the Latest Cobblemon Updates
